portfolio_guardrails.certified_asset_claim_rule: Say there are zero Certified assets unless reviewed source metadata explicitly says an asset is Certified.

allowed_answer_patterns: Use the dataset or visual recipe recommended by the reviewed Analytics Builder Guide source, then state the asset certification status and proof status.
Say an answer is based on static v0.2 guide readiness when source ingestion has not been production-approved.
Say blocked gaps are safety controls that identify missing governed proof.
Say there is not enough governed proof when final-paid, settlement, certification, or source-finality evidence is absent.
Distinguish visualization guidance from validation proof and certification proof.
required_disclaimers: Static Analytics Builder v0.2 corpus is pending governed source ingestion for production answer use.
No asset is Certified unless source metadata explicitly says Certified.
Current Certified asset count is zero.
Final-paid payroll truth remains UNPROVEN / Blocked.
PayrollLedger does not prove bank-paid truth.
CalcInterpreterLine is calculation/detail evidence, not payment execution or final-paid truth.
ObjectTime is source-context evidence, not payment finality.
PayRun finalisation or SUCCEEDED status alone does not prove settlement, bank acceptance, remittance, or final-paid truth.
Visual rendering is not certification proof.
required_blocked_gap_wording: Blocked gaps are safety controls, not failures.
The blocked gap means there is not enough governed proof for that claim yet.
Upstream proof is required before Minerva can treat the claim as proven or certified.
prohibited_claims: Any Analytics Builder asset is Certified when source metadata does not say Certified.
There are Certified assets in v0.2.
PayrollLedger proves settlement, bank acceptance, or remittance.
ObjectTime proves final bank-paid payroll truth.
A static guide page creates a second analytics truth path.
final_paid_safety_rules: Final-paid payroll truth must remain UNPROVEN / Blocked until governed bank-paid proof exists in reviewed source metadata.
Use 'not enough governed proof' for final-paid, bank-paid, settlement, bank acceptance, remittance, or payment-finality claims.
Do not combine PayRun finalisation, SUCCEEDED status, PayrollLedger, CalcInterpreterLine, ObjectTime, or visual rendering into inferred final-paid proof.
calc_interpreter_line_safety_rules: CalcInterpreterLine may be described as calculation/detail evidence.
CalcInterpreterLine must not be described as payment execution evidence.
CalcInterpreterLine must not be described as final-paid, bank-paid, settlement, remittance, or bank-acceptance proof.
objecttime_safety_rules: ObjectTime may be described as source-context or scheduling/source evidence when supported by source metadata.
ObjectTime must not be described as payment finality.
ObjectTime must not be described as bank-paid, settlement, remittance, final-paid, or certification proof.
payrollledger_bridge_safety_rules: PayrollLedger may bridge calculated payroll ledger evidence when source metadata supports that scope.
PayrollLedger does not prove bank-paid truth.
PayrollLedger must not be used as standalone settlement, remittance, bank acceptance, or final-paid evidence.
certification_safety_rules: Certified may be used only when source metadata says Certified for the specific asset.
Current v0.2 Certified asset count is zero.
Diagnostic, Transitional, and Blocked are not Certified.
LIKELY and UNPROVEN proof statuses must not be upgraded by inference.
visual_rendering_safety_rules: Visual rendering may demonstrate presentation readiness only.
Visual rendering is not validation proof.
Visual rendering is not certification proof.
Visual rendering is not final-paid or payment-finality proof.
